title: Magic Flat Manual Hand Whisk Stainless Steel Egg Beater Mixer Kitchen Tool, Mini Whisk Spring Coil Wire, Compact,Convenient and Efficient,Coffee Sauce Milk Cooking Baking Beating
features: High-quality material: Crafted from food-grade stainless steel, this mini whisk ensures safety, rust resistance, and durability, maintaining its shape over time.
Convenient design: Featuring a spring-loaded beater, effortlessly create foam for coffee, milk, and more with smooth movement over bowl rims.
Kitchen essential: The ergonomic flat handle provides a secure grip, making mixing tasks a breeze while saving time and effort in the kitchen.
Easy to clean: Simply rinse under running water after use and air dry, or toss it in the dishwasher for added convenience. Hang it on any hook alongside other kitchen tools when not in use.

Versatile usage: Ideal for mixing, stirring, beating, and more, this manual whisk is perfect for eggs, sauces, gravy, powdered sugar mixtures, and whipped cream, making it a versatile addition to any kitchen arsenal.
